steps: "File dividend tax refund claim with Dutch Belastingdienst using IB 92 form for EUR 22,193.60 excess withholding on UNA dividend",
"Submit treaty relief documentation showing Norwegian tax residency to claim 15% NL-NO treaty rate vs. 25% standard rate",
"Contact ABN AMRO Custody to request they assist with refund process and provide necessary custodial documentation",
"Follow up on refund status within 8-12 weeks as per Dutch tax authority processing timeframes"

references.title: Belastingdienst – Recipient of Dividend Outside Netherlands – Refund
